detectors.description:
Reentrancy in muskscontract._transfer(address,address,uint256) (muskscontract.sol#667-791):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (muskscontract.sol#731)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (muskscontract.sol#805-817)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (muskscontract.sol#737)
		- _marketingAddress.transfer(amount) (muskscontract.sol#825)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (muskscontract.sol#789)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (muskscontract.sol#951)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (muskscontract.sol#931)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (muskscontract.sol#933)
	muskscontract._rOwned (muskscontract.sol#343) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- muskscontract._takeTeam(uint256) (muskscontract.sol#945-953)
	- muskscontract._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (muskscontract.sol#905-941)
	- muskscontract.balanceOf(address) (muskscontract.sol#493-497)
	- muskscontract.constructor() (muskscontract.sol#427-457)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (muskscontract.sol#789)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (muskscontract.sol#959)
	muskscontract._rTotal (muskscontract.sol#355) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- muskscontract._getCurrentSupply() (muskscontract.sol#1101-1111)
	- muskscontract._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (muskscontract.sol#957-963)
	- muskscontract.constructor() (muskscontract.sol#427-457)
	- muskscontract.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (muskscontract.sol#589-611)
